dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items

Class AsyncItem<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>

  • java.lang.Object
    • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items.Item<T,S>
      • dk.tohjuler.mcutils.gui.items.AsyncItem<T,S>
  • Type Parameters:
    T - The type of the gui
    S - The type of the storage
    All Implemented Interfaces:
    IItem<T,S>

    public class AsyncItem<T extends dev.triumphteam.gui.guis.BaseGui,S extends IStorage>
extends Item<T,S>
    An async item is an item that gets loaded async.

    Since:
    1.18.0
